title: TECprobe-LM validation gel images
author: Kelly, Skyler
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Gel images collected during development of the linked multipoint Transcription Elongation Complex RNA structure probing (TECprobe-LM) method to assess the transcription roadblocking configurations that were used to capture RNA folding intermediates.
steps_raw: Gel images collected during development of the linked multipoint Transcription Elongation Complex RNA structure probing (TECprobe-LM) method to assess the transcription roadblocking configurations that were used to capture RNA folding intermediates.
